title: Timeline overlaps
excerpt:
I have a schedule board which includes a column with a timeline and another column with a staff member’s name. 
Is there any way to have it alarm if I assign a staff member to a row with a timeline that overlaps another …

posts.author: bingolittle (c.j.d.coles@gmail.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a schedule board which includes a column with a timeline and another column with a staff member’s name.

Is there any way to have it alarm if I assign a staff member to a row with a timeline that overlaps another timeline to which they are assigned?

posts.author: bingolittle (c.j.d.coles@gmail.com)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorry, I should clarify. The staff members’ names are in a Dropdown column, not a People column.
